prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A large box divided vertically in half by a thick line. Left half (green background, labeled "Ok<T>"): contains a neatly wrapped gift box with a value tag, a checkmark above, and a happy face. Right half (red background, labeled "Err<E>"): contains a caution-taped package with an error tag, a warning triangle above, and a concerned face. Below the box, a function pipe shows input entering and the box coming out, with text indicating "always one or the other, never both". Two arrows from the box show pattern matching: "if ok → use value" and "if err → handle error".
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
